title: the reference operator Operator Capability Descriptor
description: Describes the declared capabilities of a a BANZA operator and the certification level each implies.

supports_wallets.description: Wallet creation, balance query, and ledger. Required for Level 0.

supports_qr.description: QR code generation (POST /qr), scanning (decode BANZA-SBX: or BANZA: payload), and pay (POST /qr/:id/pay). Required for Level 1.

supports_settlement.description: Settlement batch creation (POST /settlements/run), status query, and fee model. Required for Level 1.

supports_payment_requests.description: Payment request creation, retrieval, and payment. Required for Level 1.

supports_events.description: Event emission via GET /events/history (SSE or polling). Required for Level 1.

supports_traces.description: Financial traceability via GET /traces and GET /traces/:id. Required for Level 2.

supports_webhooks.description: Webhook delivery with signed event envelopes. Optional; recommended for production operators.

supports_federation.description: Cross-operator federation. Requires valid manifest, capability negotiation, and Level 2 trace support. Required for Level 3.

CertificationLevelImplications.description: The minimum capabilities required at each certification level.
